resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def findNthDigit(self, n: int) -> int:
        length = 1
        count = 9
        start = 1
        while n > length * count:
            n -= length * count
            length += 1
            count *= 10
            start *= 10
        start += (n - 1) // length
        return str(start)[(n - 1) % length]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution efficiently calculates the nth digit by determining the length of the numbers that the nth digit belongs to, then directly computing the number and the position of the digit within that number.
